name: unreal-mcp
description: Control a local UnrealMCP UE5 plugin and Python MCP server for editor automation, Blueprint, material, AI, and scene operations.
goal: Translate user intent into safe, concrete UnrealMCP control steps for the local PanicRoom project and UnrealMCP server.
trigger_when: Use when the task mentions UnrealMCP, PanicRoom, UE5 editor control, Blueprint or material automation, AI setup, viewport control, or MCP-based Unreal operations.
skip_when: Skip when the work is only general Unreal discussion or unrelated to the local UnrealMCP control flow.
expected_output: A concrete UnrealMCP action plan, exact tool candidates and parameters, or a validated execution summary for UE5 editor control.
